behavior_summary: This script implements the NPC Jenna's short-examine description, autonomous ambient behavior when the player is nearby, a reaction-to-being-targeted handler, and a player-facing conversation/shop system for food and drink.
U8P_JENNA::look (process) returns a short label for Jenna: it shows corpse text if Npc::isDead(this) else selects among name/job variations controlled by jennaName and jennaJob.

U8P_JENNA::enterFastArea/U8P_JENNA::leaveFastArea are fast-area triggers: they clear behavior references (FREE::resetRef) and start or stop the NPC's autonomous behavior loop (U8P_JENNA::func0321). U8P_JENNA::leaveFastArea may mark the NPC dead (sendJennaToLunch) or teleport a dead NPC to random coordinates.

U8P_JENNA::func0321 is the main autonomous behavior loop: it runs pathfinds (Npc::pathfind), uses spawn/suspend timers, increments a cycle counter (local2) and dispatches ambient monologues (U8P_JENNA::func04B8) or short actions (U8P_JENNA::func0B16, U8P_JENNA::func0BA9).

U8P_JENNA::func04B8 (ambient monologue) checks somebodyTalking and proximity (FREE::getDistanceBetween) before picking randomized lines and scheduling waits; it uses METHOD::func091C and METHOD::func15E7 around speech for animation/timing.

U8P_JENNA::use (process) builds a dynamic conversation/shop menu (MenuSet/MenuAdd/MenuRemove/MenuUnion), presents it to the player, captures the choice (SuspendAssign into local2), and dispatches to shop handlers U8P_JENNA::func0C3E (drinks) and U8P_JENNA::func12EA (food) or other dialogue branches until the player ends the conversation.
notable_control_flow: U8P_JENNA::look: immediate guard on Npc::isDead(this) -> corpse vs living branches, then strcmp-style branching on global flags jennaName and jennaJob to select short barks.
U8P_JENNA::enterFastArea -> clears refs (FREE::resetRef) -> spawns/starts U8P_JENNA::func0321 (behavior loop).
U8P_JENNA::leaveFastArea -> clears refs -> if sendJennaToLunch then Npc::setDead(this) else if Npc::isDead(this) then Npc::teleport with random offsets.

U8P_JENNA::cast: limited polling loop (local1 starting at 10) that spawns a zero-delay timer and suspends until Npc::getTarget(this) is non-zero or counter expires; if target equals 1 triggers CALGUARD::guardRespondToCrime and chooses an alarm bark.

U8P_JENNA::func0321: suspension-based loop that launches pathfind processes, suspends, checks process_result() and either calls monologue helpers or spawns timers depending on success; increments a cycle counter to vary actions.

U8P_JENNA::use: conversation loop (ConversationLoop) that repeatedly Ask(s) the constructed menu, SuspendAssign to local2, strcmp branching on local2 to route to submenus or exit, and dynamic menu edits while conversation proceeds.
open_questions: Exact encoding/meaning of the numeric item codes stored in locals (e.g., local3/local5 in U8P_JENNA::func0C3E and local3/local4/local5 in U8P_JENNA::func12EA) — inferred as item/price identifiers but exact mapping to in-game item IDs is uncertain.
Precise nature of the door target reference used in U8P_JENNA::func0B16/U8P_JENNA::func0BA9 (what local2 refers to and how it is resolved to a specific DOOR_NS instance).
Whether U8P_JENNA::leaveFastArea's teleport coordinates (0,0 + urandom offsets) intend a safe storage area or a visual repositioning — inferred from usage but not explicit.

Any side-effects or global state changes outside jennaMet write (for example inventory/payment transfers in U8P_JENNA::func0C3E) depend on external functions (FREE::findNearbyItems / FREE::equipItem) so cash transfer semantics are inferred rather than explicit here.

main_function.name: U8P_JENNA::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short examine/"U8P_JENNA::look" description for Jenna. Chooses corpse vs living text and refines the living label using global flags (jennaName, jennaJob).
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player examines/inspects the NPC (U8P_JENNA::look trigger).
Runs whenever the engine requests the object's short description text (process type 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::look
function_map.role: short-examine/description handler; selects corpse vs living label using flags

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::enterFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area entry trigger: clear behavior refs and start autonomous behavior loop

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area exit trigger: clear refs and either set NPC dead or teleport dead NPC

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::cast
function_map.role: handles being targeted/U8P_JENNA::cast-on; polls for a target and reacts to crime-target condition

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::func0321
function_map.role: autonomous behavior loop: pathfind, wait, and trigger ambient monologues and short actions

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::func04B8
function_map.role: ambient/proximity-based monologue routine using distance and somebodyTalking suppression

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::func0B16
function_map.role: short ambient line 'Why is this open?' and door interaction

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::func0BA9
function_map.role: short ambient line 'Who left this open?' and door interaction

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::func0C3E
function_map.role: drinks shop/dialog handler: builds drinks menu, handles choice, price/item bookkeeping

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::func12EA
function_map.role: food shop/dialog handler: builds food menu, handles choice, price/item bookkeeping

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::use
function_map.role: conversation/merchant entry: constructs dynamic menu, routes player choices, loops until exit

function_map.name: Npc::isDead
function_map.role: external query to check whether NPC is dead (used by U8P_JENNA::look, U8P_JENNA::leaveFastArea, U8P_JENNA::cast)

function_map.name: FREE::resetRef
function_map.role: clear behavior/reference slots for the NPC (used by U8P_JENNA::enterFastArea/U8P_JENNA::leaveFastArea)

function_map.name: CALGUARD::guardRespondToCrime
function_map.role: trigger guard response when a crime-targeting event is detected in U8P_JENNA::cast

internal_calls.purpose: Start the NPC's autonomous behavior loop when the player enters the fast-area
Invoke ambient/proximity monologue as part of the behavior cycle
Trigger a short ambient monologue/action when the behavior cycle counter equals a specific value
Trigger another short ambient monologue/action for a specific cycle index
Route to drinks shop dialog when the player selects a drinks-related menu option
Route to food shop dialog when the player selects a food-related menu option

external_calls.purpose: Check whether to present corpse vs living description
Clear behavior/ref slots before starting behavior loop
Mark NPC dead when sendJennaToLunch flag is set
Move a dead NPC to randomized coordinates when leaving the area (storage/cleanup behavior)
Poll for who is targeting the NPC to detect a crime-target condition
Notify guard system when U8P_JENNA::cast-target indicates a crime
Start movement/pathfinding processes as part of autonomous behavior
Measure distance to another object/actor to gate proximity barks
Spawn timers to delay or schedule next monologue (suspend/resume timing)
Spawn an asynchronous door interaction after speaking
Attempt to hand/equip a purchased drink item to the player or have NPC hold it
Check for and consume payment items from the player (payment handling)

reads.name: jennaName
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether Jenna's proper name is used in U8P_JENNA::look() and some dialogue branches

reads.name: jennaJob
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether job title 'barmaid' is appended in U8P_JENNA::look() descriptions

reads.name: sendJennaToLunch
reads.likely_effect: When true on U8P_JENNA::leaveFastArea causes the NPC to be set dead instead of teleported

reads.name: somebodyTalking
reads.likely_effect: Suppresses ambient monologues in U8P_JENNA::func04B8 while another conversation is active

reads.name: orlokMet
reads.likely_effect: Alters specific ambient lines in U8P_JENNA::func04B8 to reflect story progress

reads.name: hasHeart
reads.likely_effect: Used by U8P_JENNA::use() to choose a curt greeting branch

reads.name: jennaMet
reads.likely_effect: Indicates whether the player has met Jenna; read by U8P_JENNA::use() to select greeting variants

reads.name: jennaPissed
reads.likely_effect: Selects an angry greeting/menu variant in U8P_JENNA::use()

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Adds a weather-related menu option when true

reads.name: havAvaName
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether the player name is used in salutations

reads.name: toldGhostStory
reads.likely_effect: Adds an additional menu option about Orlok's tales if true

writes.name: jennaMet
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player first meets Jenna (marks that the greeting 'first meeting' has occurred)

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the NPC Jenna's short-examine description, autonomous ambient behavior when the player is nearby, a reaction-to-being-targeted handler, and a player-facing conversation/shop system for food and drink.
